creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Nothing beats a good breakfast + rain combo!

📍 La Brasserie, @voco_monacodubai 
☔️ This restaurant is located right next to the Raining Street, so you can experience dining in the rain anytime of the day. 
🛥️ The hotel provides a complimentary boat transfer upon confirming your hotel or brunch reservation. Seats are limited, so make sure to book in advance.
👩‍❤️‍👨 Also take note that Voco Monaco is an adults-only party resort. 

Tag your breakfast date.

Dubai Breakfast • Dubai Cafe • Dubai Rain • Dubai Hotel • The World Islands • Lady and her Sweet Escapes • #DubaiBreakfast

transcription.text: Feel it in your tongue Slowly let it come
